input_text: Checkout stopped working at 2026-06-16T10:14:00Z. Severity is critical and about 500 users are affected. SRE is investigating.
Search latency increased in production at 2026-06-16T11:05:00Z. Impact is low, no users are blocked, and the incident is still open.
Payments API returned 500 errors from 2026-06-16T09:20:00Z. Severity high. 220 users could not complete purchases. Payments team is investigating.
Authentication callbacks intermittently failed around 2026-06-16T12:45:00Z. Medium severity, about 35 users affected, status investigating.
Inventory cache served stale stock counts at 2026-06-16T13:30:00Z. Medium severity. No users were blocked. The issue was resolved after cache invalidation.
Email notifications were delayed starting 2026-06-16T14:10:00Z. Low severity. 1200 users received late notifications and the incident remains open.
Primary database failover started at 2026-06-16T15:02:00Z after the primary node became unreachable. Critical severity. 3200 users saw checkout errors. SRE is investigating.
Feature flag service timed out at 2026-06-16T16:18:00Z and blocked rollout checks. High severity, 80 internal users affected. Restarting the service resolved it.
The CDN TLS certificate expired at 2026-06-16T17:40:00Z for storefront traffic. Critical severity. Around 10000 users could not load the site. Certificate renewal resolved the incident.
Analytics ingestion backlog began at 2026-06-16T18:25:00Z. Low severity. No user-facing impact, affected service analytics, status open.
